extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won after CONTI Valerio crashed on a dangerous corner descending, eliminating the breakaway's main threat to the pink jersey.
tactical_patterns: LANDA Mikel attacked GC group on early climb to probe rivals, revealing Sky's willingness to test before summit finishes.
PINOT Thibaut immediately countered LANDA's reabsorption, showing FDJ won't let Sky control tempo without challenging rhythm.
CONTI Valerio prioritized intermediate sprint seconds unusually, suggesting Bahrain targeting secondary classifications when GC attacks neutralized.
SÁNCHEZ Luis León waited for dropped companions rather than solo bridge, revealing breakaway riders value group dynamics over individual glory on technical finales.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: converted positioning through technical descent corner into sprint win, showing rare descending confidence for pure sprinter
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: negative: crashed on descent corner while in winning breakaway, lost stage and demonstrated GC vulnerability on technical descents
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: probed GC group early but immediately caught, testing form without committing full effort
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: countered immediately after LANDA caught, showing aggressive intent and willingness to attack without waiting for climbs
rider_signals.VISCONTI Giovanni: positive: finished second after late chase, demonstrating veteran ability to time efforts on chaotic technical finishes
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: neutral: retained pink jersey through attentive positioning despite multiple GC attacks on rolling stage
